name: Mendel's Garden
short_description: Mendel's Garden is a gardening game inspired by classical genetics. You explore mysterious gardens, harvest and grow exotic plants and grow useful items by mixing together plants with different traits. Items you can use to venture deeper into this world.
detailed_description:
What is Mendel's Garden?

Mendel's garden is a gardening game where every plant has one or more traits, many of which are hidden. You harvest seeds from these plants and try to isolate these hidden traits by planting and growing the seeds. Craft items by combining seeds with different traits and use these items to progress further in the world.

Harvest seeds from plants with hidden traits.


Grow the seeds to isolate these traits.


Craft items by mixing different traits and use them to move further in the world.

The gardens

The world contains multiple gardens
  • 1. Grow plants instantly using a special kind of rain.
  • 2. Overcome barriers by crafting the appropriate plants or items and explore the deepest parts of the gardens.
  • 3. Discover the story behind the garden as you progress.

Story

Set in the Bhumi universe Mendel's garden explores the story of Mendel and his journey. Mendel ventures into unknown lands teeming with helpful and harmful plants to learn about them and understand them. In doing so he stumbles upon ancient secrets, dark mysteries and most importantly finds his purpose in this strange world.

Trailer Music credits
Clear water by Kevin MacLeod
Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 3.0 License
